dialogues.cn: 莱安爵士曾是御林铁卫强有力的队长
dialogues.en: Ser Ryam was a strong Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.

dialogues.cn: 但已抱恙有时
dialogues.en: But he was ill for some time.

dialogues.cn: 但愿他走得安详
dialogues.en: He passed in peace, I hope.

dialogues.cn: 是的 陛下
dialogues.en: Yes, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我们发现他在梦中安详地走了
dialogues.en: He was found to have passed gently in his sleep.

dialogues.cn: 静默姐妹已经在整理他的遗体
dialogues.en: His remains are being prepared by the Silent Sisters.

dialogues.cn: 继任的队长是哈罗德爵士
dialogues.en: The succeeding Lord Commander, Ser Harrold

dialogues.cn: 希望可以尽快
dialogues.en: would like to make haste

dialogues.cn: 确认人选补充莱安爵士在御林铁卫中留下的空位
dialogues.en: in finding Ser Ryam's replacement on the Kingsguard.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 各位大人
dialogues.en: Your Grace. My lords.

dialogues.cn: 御林铁卫很快就能恢复七人满员
dialogues.en: The Kingsguard must soon be restored to its full complement of seven.

dialogues.cn: 在首相大人的帮助下
dialogues.en: With the help of the Hand

dialogues.cn: 我已经邀请了多位优秀的候选人来到宫廷
dialogues.en: I've invited a number of fine candidates to court.

dialogues.cn: 他们全都通过了合理的测试
dialogues.en: All have passed fair trials.

dialogues.cn: 我们已经损失了四艘船
dialogues.en: Four ships have now been lost.

dialogues.cn: 最新一艘还挂着我的旗帜
dialogues.en: The last one was flying my banner.

dialogues.cn: 石阶列岛已经变成大患
dialogues.en: The Stepstones have now grown into a conflagration

dialogues.cn: 诸位却还坐在这里为朝廷上那点事举棋不定
dialogues.en: yet you sit here and dither about court business.

dialogues.cn: 科利斯大人 您要是有什么想探讨的……
dialogues.en: If you've something to discuss, Lord Corlys...

dialogues.cn: 我就想知道我损失的船和手下应该怎么办
dialogues.en: I want to know what is to be done about my ships and my men.

dialogues.cn: 国王会补偿你的船只和人员损失的
dialogues.en: The crown will compensate you for your ship and crew

dialogues.cn: 也会对牺牲船员的家属
dialogues.en: and make an offering

dialogues.cn: -进行慰问补偿 -我要的不是补偿
dialogues.en: - to the men's families. - I don't want compensation.

dialogues.cn: 我需要武力围剿石阶列岛
dialogues.en: I want to seize the Stepstones by force

dialogues.cn: 把这个螃蟹喂食者赶尽杀绝
dialogues.en: and burn out this Crabfeeder.

dialogues.cn: 我还没准备好跟自由城邦开战
dialogues.en: I am not prepared to start a war with the Free Cities.

dialogues.cn: 这些海盗才不代表自由城邦
dialogues.en: These pirates are not the Free Cities.

dialogues.cn: 那你觉得是谁在背后给他们提供船只和钱财？
dialogues.en: Who do you think provides them with their ships and tender?

dialogues.cn: 大人 纵观历史
dialogues.en: In all of its history, my lord

dialogues.cn: 七大王国从未与自由城邦正式开战
dialogues.en: the Seven Kingdoms have never entered open war with the Free Cities.

dialogues.cn: 因为一旦开战
dialogues.en: Were that to happen

dialogues.cn: 损失不可计量
dialogues.en: the losses would be incalculable.

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹喂食者有什么可惧怕我们的
dialogues.en: What reason does the Crabfeeder have to fear us?

dialogues.cn: 国王还允许亲弟弟占据龙石岛
dialogues.en: The King's own brother has been allowed to seize Dragonstone

dialogues.cn: 并用他的金袍子队伍加强守备呢
dialogues.en: and fortify it with an army of his Gold Cloaks.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙已盘踞在那里半年之久
dialogues.en: Daemon has squatted there for over half a year

dialogues.cn: 国王根本没有任何反对的迹象
dialogues.en: without even a protest from the crown.

dialogues.cn: 我得提醒你 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: I'll caution you, Lord Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 和国王同桌议事并不代表你与国王平起平坐
dialogues.en: A seat at the King's table does not make you his equal.

dialogues.cn: 我已经采取了措施 科利斯
dialogues.en: I have acted, Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 我已经向潘托斯和瓦兰提斯派出使节
dialogues.en: I've sent envoys to Pentos and Volantis

dialogues.cn: 看是否能达成一些共识
dialogues.en: to see if we might find common cause.

dialogues.cn: 船只和人马随时可以出发
dialogues.en: Ships and men are at the ready.

dialogues.cn: 我们会解决石阶列岛的 迟早
dialogues.en: The Stepstones will be settled in time.

dialogues.cn: 您有龙骑士啊 父王
dialogues.en: You have dragonriders, Father.

dialogues.cn: 派我们去吧
dialogues.en: Send us.

dialogues.cn: 此事没这么简单 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: It isn't that simple, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 这可以展示力量
dialogues.en: It would be a show of force.

dialogues.cn: 至少公主殿下有点想法
dialogues.en: At least the Princess has a plan.

dialogues.cn: 我只想说 我们至少可以……
dialogues.en: I only meant that we should at least...

dialogues.cn: 可能公主的才能
dialogues.en: Perhaps there's some better use

dialogues.cn: 当下可以在别处发挥更好的作用 陛下
dialogues.en: for the Princess's talents, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 不如你带上公主
dialogues.en: Why don't you take the Princess

dialogues.cn: 去看看御林铁卫的候选骑士吧
dialogues.en: to see about the new Kingsguard posting

dialogues.cn: 队长大人？
dialogues.en: Lord Commander?

dialogues.cn: 是个好主意 陛下
dialogues.en: A fine idea, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 新的御林铁卫也将护你周全
dialogues.en: This knight will protect you as well.

dialogues.cn: 应该由你来选
dialogues.en: You should choose.

dialogues.cn: 戴斯蒙·卡伦爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Desmond Caron.

dialogues.cn: 一位优秀的骑士 公主
dialogues.en: A fine knight, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 上前一步 戴斯蒙爵士
dialogues.en: Step forward, Ser Desmond.

dialogues.cn: 罗伊斯·卡伦爵士之子
dialogues.en: Son of Ser Royce Caron

dialogues.cn: 戴斯蒙爵士已经证明自己在
dialogues.en: Ser Desmond has proved strong and steady

dialogues.cn: 比武赛场的场上场下都能强有力地稳定发挥
dialogues.en: in both the tourney lists and without.

dialogues.cn: 在前来君临途径御林的路上
dialogues.en: While traveling through the Kingswood on his way to King's Landing

dialogues.cn: 戴斯蒙爵士将一个想偷猎的人绳之以法
dialogues.en: Ser Desmond recently brought a would-be poacher to justice.

dialogues.cn: 您应当感谢他的忠诚侍奉 公主
dialogues.en: You might thank him for his leal service, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我们感谢你对国王的忠诚侍奉 爵士
dialogues.en: We thank you for your loyal service to the crown, ser.

dialogues.cn: 莱门·梅利斯特爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Rymun Mallister.

dialogues.cn: 海疆城莱蒙·梅利斯特伯爵之子
dialogues.en: Son of Lord Lymond Mallister of Seagard.

dialogues.cn: 果酒厅团体比武的冠军
dialogues.en: Winner of the melee at Cider Hall.

dialogues.cn: 他是二十三名骑士中唯一没被打下马的
dialogues.en: He was the last mounted of three-and-twenty knights.

dialogues.cn: 莱门爵士受封时才18岁
dialogues.en: Ser Rymun was knighted at eight-and-ten.

dialogues.cn: 这些骑士谁有实战经验？
dialogues.en: Do any of these knights have combat experience?

dialogues.cn: 抓偷猎者不算
dialogues.en: Beyond capturing poachers.

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿·科尔爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Criston Cole.

dialogues.cn: 黑港伯爵管家的儿子
dialogues.en: Son of the steward of the Lord of Blackhaven.

dialogues.cn: 欢迎 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: Be welcome, Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 你见识过风暴地的战斗
dialogues.en: You saw combat in the Stormlands.

dialogues.cn: 在多恩边疆地 公主
dialogues.en: Dornish marches, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我作为步兵跟多恩进犯者打了一年
dialogues.en: I fought for a year as a foot solider against the Dornish incursions.

dialogues.cn: 阿兰·唐德利恩爵士封我为骑士
dialogues.en: Ser Arlan Dondarrion knighted me

dialogues.cn: 当时我们突袭了骨路上的两处瞭望塔
dialogues.en: after we razed two of the watchtowers along the Boneway.

dialogues.cn: 我选克里斯顿·科尔爵士
dialogues.en: I choose Ser Criston Cole.

dialogues.cn: 我们不要这么快做决定 公主殿下
dialogues.en: Let's not be too hasty, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿爵士无疑是出色的战士
dialogues.en: There's no doubt Ser Criston is a fine warrior

dialogues.cn: 但克雷赫和梅利斯特这些家族
dialogues.en: but houses such as Crakehall and Mallister

dialogues.cn: 都是国王重要的盟友
dialogues.en: are important allies of the crown.

dialogues.cn: 就比如海疆城 是王国应对铁群岛劫掠威胁
dialogues.en: Seagard, for instance, is the realm's prime defense

dialogues.cn: 主要的防守力量
dialogues.en: against reavers from the Iron Islands.

dialogues.cn: 他们只是比武会的骑士
dialogues.en: Those men are tourney knights.

dialogues.cn: 父王需要一个有实战经验的人来保护
dialogues.en: My father should be defended by a man who's known real combat.

dialogues.cn: 不是吗？
dialogues.en: Should he not?

dialogues.cn: 当然 公主明智
dialogues.en: Of course, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 那就快去安排克里斯顿爵士的就职礼吧
dialogues.en: Well, let us plan Ser Criston's investiture then.

dialogues.cn: 瓦雷利亚的首都修建在火山之上
dialogues.en: The Valyrian capital was built into a volcano

dialogues.cn: 就像龙石岛
dialogues.en: much like Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 而龙王 那些地位最高的贵族
dialogues.en: And the dragonlords, the highest of the nobility

dialogues.cn: 就栖身于此 在火山的表面
dialogues.en: lived here, at the volcanic face

dialogues.cn: 紧贴魔法和力量的源泉
dialogues.en: closest to the source of their magic and power.

dialogues.cn: Anogrion，瓦雷利亚语“庙宇”之意，词源是ānogar，“血”。
这里则是“血庙”
dialogues.en: And this was the Anogrion.

dialogues.cn: 血巫在这里精进他们的技艺
dialogues.en: Where the bloodmages worked their craft.

dialogues.cn: 您的造物 真是美轮美奂
dialogues.en: It is truly wondrous, what you've built.

dialogues.cn: 过奖
dialogues.en: Oh, no.

dialogues.cn: 我不过是查阅了历史 做了点规划
dialogues.en: I only pore over the histories and provide the plans.

dialogues.cn: 石匠们才是它真正的建造者
dialogues.en: The stonemasons built the structures.

dialogues.cn: 您认为维斯特洛能够成为下一个瓦雷利亚么 陛下？
dialogues.en: Do you believe that Westeros can be another Valyria, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 看情况
dialogues.en: That depends

dialogues.cn: 得看你到底说的是自由堡垒的全盛时期还是衰败年代
dialogues.en: whether you speak of the Freehold at its height or at its fall.

dialogues.cn: 上千头龙
dialogues.en: Over a thousand dragons,

dialogues.cn: 还有一支足以横跨世界海洋的庞大舰队
dialogues.en: a navy large enough to span the seas of the world.

dialogues.cn: 瓦雷利亚的旧日荣光必然已经无法重现于世
dialogues.en: The glory of Old Valyria will never be seen again.

dialogues.cn: 七层地狱啊
dialogues.en: Seven Hells.

dialogues.cn: 说说吧 雷妮拉状态如何
dialogues.en: Tell me, how is Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 您指什么？
dialogues.en: What do you mean?

dialogues.cn: 这些日子 她始终不愿意跟我多说一句话
dialogues.en: Well, these days, she doesn't say more than a few words to me.

dialogues.cn: 我感觉她现在可能很难开口
dialogues.en: I think she might find it difficult

dialogues.cn: 谈论私事
dialogues.en: to discuss personal matters.

dialogues.cn: 给她点时间吧
dialogues.en: It will take time.

dialogues.cn: 我母亲去世时 我也低迷了一段时间
dialogues.en: It did when I lost mine own mother.

dialogues.cn: 我真希望她能来找我聊聊
dialogues.en: I wish she would approach me.

dialogues.cn: 如果您去找她呢？
dialogues.en: What if you went to her?

dialogues.cn: 有时候我宁愿直面“黑死神”
dialogues.en: There are times when I would rather face the Black Dread himself

dialogues.cn: 也不愿面对我那十五岁的女儿
dialogues.en: than mine own daughter of fifteen.

dialogues.cn: 我认为如果您主动点的话 她会向您敞开心扉的
dialogues.en: I think she would open herself to you if invited.

dialogues.cn: 您有着那么平易近人的一面 陛下
dialogues.en: You do have such an easy way about you, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你没有和雷妮拉提起过我们的谈话吧？
dialogues.en: You do not mention our talks to Rhaenyra, do you?

dialogues.cn: 我只是……
dialogues.en: I just...

dialogues.cn: 我怕她误会
dialogues.en: I fear that she wouldn't understand them.

dialogues.cn: 我没有提过 陛下
dialogues.en: No, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我的母亲才去世刚半年
dialogues.en: It's only been half a year since my mother died

dialogues.cn: 他们就试图让父亲再娶
dialogues.en: and already they tried to marry my father off

dialogues.cn: 然后好换掉我这个继承人
dialogues.en: and replace me as heir.

dialogues.cn: 我了解这些人
dialogues.en: I know those men

dialogues.cn: 也知道在我被打发走后
dialogues.en: and how they plot in their secret councils

dialogues.cn: 他们是怎么在御前会议中密谋的
dialogues.en: when I've been sent away.

dialogues.cn: 你无法为国王和大臣们的事务操心 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: You cannot worry at the matters of lords and kings, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 假如你父亲真的再娶了呢？
dialogues.en: What if your father were to remarry?

dialogues.cn: 你的父亲很爱你
dialogues.en: Your father loves you.

dialogues.cn: 他选择了你作为继承人
dialogues.en: He chose you for his heir.

dialogues.cn: 他才不是选择了我 他只是撇开了戴蒙
dialogues.en: He didn't choose me. He spurned Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 陪我一起跪下吧
dialogues.en: Kneel with me.

dialogues.cn: 我发现这样可以感受到母亲与我同在
dialogues.en: I find this is a way to be with my mother.

dialogues.cn: 在这静谧的圣堂中……
dialogues.en: Here in the quiet of the Sept...

dialogues.cn: 我感觉她就在我的身边
dialogues.en: I feel close to her.

dialogues.cn: - 我知道这听上去有点傻 - 我不觉得傻
dialogues.en: - I know it sounds foolish. - I don't think it's foolish.

dialogues.cn: - 真的不觉得 - 那就好
dialogues.en: - I don't. - Good.

dialogues.cn: 因为我觉得你也可以试试
dialogues.en: Because I thought you might try.

dialogues.cn: 那好
dialogues.en: Aye.

dialogues.cn: 就算你不相信我 或许相信一下诸神
dialogues.en: If not for me, then perhaps for them.

dialogues.cn: 我该说点什么？
dialogues.en: What do I say?

dialogues.cn: 你想说什么都可以
dialogues.en: Whatever you wish.

dialogues.cn: 只有你和诸神才会知道
dialogues.en: It's only for you and the gods to know.

dialogues.cn: 我希望父亲不再只是把我当成一个小女孩了
dialogues.en: I want him to see me as more than his little girl.

dialogues.cn: 我父亲也读不懂女孩子的心思
dialogues.en: Mine own father does not know the language of girls either.

dialogues.cn: 当我想和他聊聊的时候
dialogues.en: When I wish to talk with him

dialogues.cn: 我知道我必须主动些
dialogues.en: I know that I must make the effort.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢你
dialogues.en: Thank you.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我很高兴我们可以聊一聊
dialogues.en: I'm glad we could meet.

dialogues.cn: 我知道今天大家的火气有点大
dialogues.en: I know tempers ran hot today

dialogues.cn: 而我想向你保证
dialogues.en: and I wanted to assure you

dialogues.cn: 我非常珍视我们家族之间的深厚情谊
dialogues.en: how much I value the bond between our houses.

dialogues.cn: 毕竟雷妮丝是我最喜欢的近亲了
dialogues.en: Rhaenys is my favorite cousin after all.

dialogues.cn: 我想为我今天
dialogues.en: I wish to apologize

dialogues.cn: 在御前会议上的语调道歉 陛下
dialogues.en: for the tenor at the small council today, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我的本意并非冒犯您
dialogues.en: It was not my intent to make offense.

dialogues.cn: 你的舰队是王国最重要的资产之一 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: Your fleet is one of the realm's most important assets, Lord Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 但你必须要明白……
dialogues.en: But you must understand...

dialogues.cn: 作为国王 我有义务避免战争
dialogues.en: as King, it is my obligation to avoid war

dialogues.cn: 除非战争无法避免
dialogues.en: until such time it is unavoidable.

dialogues.cn: 我们都不希望公然开战
dialogues.en: None among us desire open war.

dialogues.cn: 但我可以直言相告吗 陛下？
dialogues.en: Might I speak plainly, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 我向来欢迎
dialogues.en: I always welcome

dialogues.cn: 御前会议的大臣们直言进谏
dialogues.en: the unfettered thoughts of my council.

dialogues.cn: 我担心我们的敌人现在已经盯上了红堡
dialogues.en: I fear that the eyes of our enemies are presently fixed on the Red Keep.

dialogues.cn: 王后去世了
dialogues.en: The Queen has passed.

dialogues.cn: 一个女孩被指定为铁王座的继承人
dialogues.en: A girl has been named heir to the Iron Throne...

dialogues.cn: 这可是历史上的头一次
dialogues.en: the first in its history.

dialogues.cn: 国王的弟弟 被剥夺了继承权后
dialogues.en: The King's brother, so disinherited

dialogues.cn: 占据了龙石岛上的坦格利安族堡
dialogues.en: has claimed the Targaryen seat on Dragonstone

dialogues.cn: 无人质询
dialogues.en: without challenge.

dialogues.cn: 而现在 一股外来势力在我们最重要的航线上
dialogues.en: And now, a foreign power has established a colony

dialogues.cn: 建立了殖民地
dialogues.en: in our most critical shipping lane.

dialogues.cn: 你为我的统治描绘了一幅充满机遇的的图景 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: You paint such an aspirant portrait of my reign, Lord Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 可这是实话 堂弟
dialogues.en: It is an honest one, Cousin.

dialogues.cn: 当下 你的王位看上去显得有些脆弱
dialogues.en: At the moment, the crown is perceived as being vulnerable.

dialogues.cn: 盲目地进攻石阶列岛
dialogues.en: And a blind incursion in the Stepstones

dialogues.cn: 就是证明我们并不脆弱的唯一办法吗？
dialogues.en: is the only way to demonstrate that we are not?

dialogues.cn: 想要渡过风暴
dialogues.en: To elude a storm

dialogues.cn: 要么径直驶入风暴 要么环绕风暴而行
dialogues.en: you can either sail into it or around it.

dialogues.cn: 绝不能静待风暴降临
dialogues.en: But you must never await its coming.

dialogues.cn: 你有什么实际行动的建议吗……
dialogues.en: Do you have a specific course of action to propose...

dialogues.cn: 大人？
dialogues.en: my lord?

dialogues.cn: 联合我们的家族
dialogues.en: Join our families.

dialogues.cn: 迎娶我们的女儿 兰娜尔
dialogues.en: Wed our daughter, Laena.

dialogues.cn: 把两个幸存的瓦雷利亚大家族联合起来
dialogues.en: Unite the two great surviving Valyrian houses.

dialogues.cn: 坦格利安家的龙和瓦列利安家的舰队通过血脉结合在一起
dialogues.en: With the Targaryen dragons and the Velaryon fleet bound in blood

dialogues.cn: 您就可以向全天下展示
dialogues.en: you can show the realm

dialogues.cn: 王权的统治依然是东升的旭日 而非昔日的荣光
dialogues.en: that the crown's strongest days are ahead, not behind.

dialogues.cn: 我必须要承认……
dialogues.en: I must admit...

dialogues.cn: 我还没怎么考虑过再婚
dialogues.en: I haven't given marriage much thought.

dialogues.cn: 爱玛去世还不到半年
dialogues.en: It hasn't even been half a year since Aemma passed.

dialogues.cn: 全境上下都预计您早晚会续弦 陛下
dialogues.en: The realm expects you to take a new wife soon or late, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 续弦将增强您的血脉 诞下更多子嗣
dialogues.en: to strengthen your line and produce more heirs.

dialogues.cn: 您找不到比兰娜尔更强的人选了
dialogues.en: You could not ask for a stronger match than Laena.

dialogues.cn: 我们很久没怎么说话了……
dialogues.en: We haven't spoken much...

dialogues.cn: 自那以后
dialogues.en: since.

dialogues.cn: 我很后悔
dialogues.en: A regret of mine.

dialogues.cn: 我们应该对彼此敞开心扉
dialogues.en: We should be free to speak our minds to one another.

dialogues.cn: 您想说什么都可以
dialogues.en: You can say whatever you'd like.

dialogues.cn: 您是国王
dialogues.en: You are the King.

dialogues.cn: 我非常爱你的母亲
dialogues.en: I loved your mother very much.

dialogues.cn: 我也是
dialogues.en: As did I.

dialogues.cn: 哈罗德爵士带来了一院子的比武骑士供我选择
dialogues.en: Ser Harrold provided a fine field of tourney knights.

dialogues.cn: 哦？
dialogues.en: Oh?

dialogues.cn: 不过在询问的时候
dialogues.en: But in questioning them

dialogues.cn: 我发现他们当中只有克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: I discovered that Ser Criston was the only man among them

dialogues.cn: 拥有真正的战场经验
dialogues.en: with true battle experience.

dialogues.cn: 他会成为一个优秀的御林铁卫
dialogues.en: He'll make a fine knight of the Kingsguard.

dialogues.cn: - 今天在御前会议…… - 别放在心上
dialogues.en: - Today at small council... - Pay it no mind.

dialogues.cn: 我本以为自己有一些洞见……
dialogues.en: I thought I might have had some insight...

dialogues.cn: 你还年轻
dialogues.en: You're young.

dialogues.cn: 会学到的
dialogues.en: You will learn.

dialogues.cn: 这是保住手指的最好办法了 陛下
dialogues.en: This is our best chance to save the digit, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 这些蛆会吃掉死肉
dialogues.en: The maggots will remove the dead flesh

dialogues.cn: 但愿还能防止腐烂扩散
dialogues.en: and hopefully stop the advance of the rot.

dialogues.cn: 早些时候我会见了
dialogues.en: I held an audience earlier today

dialogues.cn: 科利斯大人和雷妮丝公主
dialogues.en: with Lord Corlys and Princess Rhaenys.

dialogues.cn: 您这样做非常仁慈 陛下
dialogues.en: That was most charitable of you, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我相信科利斯大人会心存感激
dialogues.en: I'm sure Lord Corlys appreciated the spirit of it.

dialogues.cn: 他向我提议了一桩婚事
dialogues.en: He proposed a marriage.

dialogues.cn: 他提议的人选是谁呢 陛下？
dialogues.en: To whom, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 兰娜尔小姐
dialogues.en: The Lady Laena.

dialogues.cn: 此举将合并我们两大家族的实力
dialogues.en: To combine the strength of our houses

dialogues.cn: 彰显出我的统治会如东升旭日般日渐强盛……
dialogues.en: and demonstrate my reign's strongest days are ahead...

dialogues.cn: 而非只有昔日荣光
dialogues.en: not behind.

dialogues.cn: 科利斯大人僭越了 陛下
dialogues.en: Lord Corlys has overreached, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 此等大事应当在御前会议中讨论
dialogues.en: Such matters must be discussed with the small council.

dialogues.cn: 我这不正在和你讨论呢
dialogues.en: That is what I'm doing, presently.

dialogues.cn: 亲爱的奥托 你有何建议呢？
dialogues.en: So, what is your advice, dear Otto?

dialogues.cn: 兰娜尔小姐
dialogues.en: The Lady Laena

dialogues.cn: 还年幼 陛下
dialogues.en: is young, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 此话没错
dialogues.en: Indeed...

dialogues.cn: 然而当年大议会造成的裂痕
dialogues.en: but the wounds made by the Great Council

dialogues.cn: 依然挥之不去 陛下
dialogues.en: still linger, my King.

dialogues.cn: 迎娶他们的女儿是在弥合裂痕的路上
dialogues.en: A match with their daughter would go a long way towards...

dialogues.cn: 迈出一大步
dialogues.en: sealing the breach

dialogues.cn: 两个伟大的瓦雷利亚家族的联姻
dialogues.en: and uniting the two great Valyrian houses

dialogues.cn: 无疑是向举国上下放出团结的信号
dialogues.en: would certainly signal unity throughout the realm

dialogues.cn: 对国外也一样
dialogues.en: and beyond.

dialogues.cn: 大学士所言有理
dialogues.en: The Grand Maester's reasoning is sound.

dialogues.cn: 我倒担心雷妮拉会怎么想
dialogues.en: I do fear what Rhaenyra might think.

dialogues.cn: 这有什么关系呢 陛下？
dialogues.en: What does it matter, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 她的母亲去世了
dialogues.en: Her mother has passed.

dialogues.cn: 她的父亲必须延续王室血脉
dialogues.en: Her father must propagate the royal line.

dialogues.cn: 我也深爱过我的妻子
dialogues.en: I dearly loved my own lady wife.

dialogues.cn: 她的逝去带来的痛苦依然萦绕我的心头
dialogues.en: The pain of her passing still haunts me.

dialogues.cn: 然而我被迫另寻她人
dialogues.en: And to be compelled to...

dialogues.cn: 以履行义务
dialogues.en: replace her for duty's sake...

dialogues.cn: 您是国王
dialogues.en: You are the King

dialogues.cn: 但在这点上我们是相通的
dialogues.en: but I do not envy you.

dialogues.cn: 骑着“黑死神”在天空中翱翔是什么感觉？
dialogues.en: What was it like flying the Black Dread?

dialogues.cn: 您是贝勒里恩的最后一位骑手
dialogues.en: You were Balerion's last rider.

dialogues.cn: 那只是他死前很短暂的一段时光
dialogues.en: Only for a short time before he died.

dialogues.cn: 古瓦雷利亚最后的回忆也随他一并逝去
dialogues.en: With Balerion died the last memory of Valyria of Old.

dialogues.cn: 可瓦格哈尔还活着
dialogues.en: But Vhagar still lives...

dialogues.cn: 在某处
dialogues.en: somewhere.

dialogues.cn: 对于龙穴来说 她太大了
dialogues.en: Bit too large for the Dragonpit.

dialogues.cn: 有人会说 她对我们的世界来说也太大
dialogues.en: Some would say too large for our world.

dialogues.cn: - 您知道她在哪儿筑巢吗？ - 你说什么？
dialogues.en: - Do you know where she nests? - I'm sorry?

dialogues.cn: 您知道瓦格哈尔现在何处吗？
dialogues.en: Do you know where Vhagar is now?

dialogues.cn: 啊 龙卫们认为
dialogues.en: Ah. The dragonkeepers believe

dialogues.cn: 她在狭海沿岸某处安了家
dialogues.en: she made home somewhere on the coast of the Narrow Sea.

dialogues.cn: 香料镇的工人时不时报告能听到她的歌声
dialogues.en: The workers at Spicetown report hearing her song at times.

dialogues.cn: 他们说她听上去很悲伤
dialogues.en: They say it is a sad thing.

dialogues.cn: 我想就连龙也会感到孤独
dialogues.en: I imagine even dragons get lonely.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 若能像古瓦雷利亚时那样联合我们两家
dialogues.en: It would be a great honor

dialogues.cn: 会是莫大的荣耀
dialogues.en: to join our houses as they were in Old Valyria.

dialogues.cn: 我能为您诞下许多拥有纯正瓦雷利亚血统的孩子
dialogues.en: I would give you many children of pure Valyrian blood

dialogues.cn: 这将巩固王室血脉与全境统治
dialogues.en: so that we might strengthen the royal line and the realm.

dialogues.cn: 这是你的父亲教你说的？
dialogues.en: Is that what your father told you to say?

dialogues.cn: 你的母亲是怎么跟你说的？
dialogues.en: What did your mother tell you?

dialogues.cn: 她说在我十四岁之前 我不会与您圆房
dialogues.en: That I wouldn't have to bed you until I turned fourteen.

dialogues.cn: 这让你很困扰 对不对？
dialogues.en: It bothers you, does it not?

dialogues.cn: 我的父亲是国王
dialogues.en: My father is a king.

dialogues.cn: 续弦添子是他的义务
dialogues.en: It is his duty to take a new wife and strengthen his line.

dialogues.cn: 我不想听你来讲授政治
dialogues.en: I did not ask for a lesson in politics.

dialogues.cn: 我问你的是 你是否为此困扰
dialogues.en: I asked whether this bothers you.

dialogues.cn: 兰娜尔是您的女儿 公主殿下
dialogues.en: Laena is your daughter, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 那您是否困扰？
dialogues.en: Does it bother you?

dialogues.cn: 当然
dialogues.en: Of course it does.

dialogues.cn: 但我明白凡事都有秩序
dialogues.en: But I understand the order of things.

dialogues.cn: 我不清楚你是否明白
dialogues.en: I'm not sure you do.

dialogues.cn: 如果您想激怒我
dialogues.en: If you mean to elicit some anger from me

dialogues.cn: 您做得并不成功 公主殿下
dialogues.en: you should know that you're failing, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 恰恰相反
dialogues.en: Quite the opposite.

dialogues.cn: 无论是我的女儿 还是其他家族的小姐
dialogues.en: Whether it's to my daughter or to someone else's

dialogues.cn: 你父亲迟早会再娶妻
dialogues.en: your father will remarry sooner than late.

dialogues.cn: 新王后会诞下新继承人
dialogues.en: His new wife will produce new heirs

dialogues.cn: 其中大有可能会有男性
dialogues.en: and chances are better than not that one of those will be male.

dialogues.cn: 当王子到了年龄 一旦你父王去世
dialogues.en: And when that boy comes of age and your father has passed

dialogues.cn: 天下人会期盼王子继位
dialogues.en: the men of the realm will expect him to be heir...

dialogues.cn: 而不是你
dialogues.en: not you.

dialogues.cn: 这就是世间万物的秩序
dialogues.en: Because that is the order of things.

dialogues.cn: 等我成为女王 我会创造新的秩序
dialogues.en: When I'm Queen, I will create a new order.

dialogues.cn: 我多希望那能成真 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: How I wish that could be, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 不过七大王国的人曾有机会
dialogues.en: But the men of the realm already had their opportunity

dialogues.cn: 在大议会上任命一位女王
dialogues.en: to appoint a ruling queen at the Great Council

dialogues.cn: 但他们拒绝了
dialogues.en: and they denied it.

dialogues.cn: 他们拒绝的是你 雷妮丝公主
dialogues.en: They denied you, Princess Rhaenys.

dialogues.cn: “无冕女王”
dialogues.en: "The Queen Who Never Was."

dialogues.cn: 但他们屈膝于我 尊称我为铁王座的继承人
dialogues.en: But they bent the knee to me and called me heir to the throne.

dialogues.cn: 当你为御前会议斟酒时 也会这样说么？
dialogues.en: Do you remind your father's men of that as you carry their cups?

dialogues.cn: 听好这个冷酷的事实
dialogues.en: Here is the hard truth

dialogues.cn: ——别人才不会好心告诉你
dialogues.en: which no one else has the heart to tell you.

dialogues.cn: 男人们宁愿将王国付之一炬
dialogues.en: Men would sooner put the realm to the torch

dialogues.cn: 也不愿看到女人登上铁王座
dialogues.en: than see a woman ascend the Iron Throne.

dialogues.cn: 你父王并不傻
dialogues.en: And your father is no fool.

dialogues.cn: 御前会议力促我再娶
dialogues.en: The small council is urging me to remarry.

dialogues.cn: 看来王国需要新王后
dialogues.en: It seems the realm wants for a new queen.

dialogues.cn: 一位贤惠善良的王后会为您的臣民带来安慰
dialogues.en: A good and kind queen will give comfort to your subjects.

dialogues.cn: 御前议会是否已经中意哪位小姐了？
dialogues.en: Does the small council have a particular lady in mind?

dialogues.cn: 科利斯·瓦列利安伯爵提名他女儿
dialogues.en: Lord Corlys Velaryon has offered the hand of his daughter...

dialogues.cn: 兰娜尔小姐
dialogues.en: the Lady Laena.

dialogues.cn: 这是个强力人选 陛下
dialogues.en: A very strong match, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 实话实说 我不怎么了解兰娜尔
dialogues.en: I must admit, I don't know Laena very well.

dialogues.cn: 我相信她是一位贤惠善良的小姐
dialogues.en: I'm sure that she is good and kind

dialogues.cn: 她会享受您的陪伴 陛下 就像我一样
dialogues.en: and that she will enjoy your company as I have, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我带了东西给您
dialogues.en: I brought you something.

dialogues.cn: 我让石匠修好了它
dialogues.en: I asked the stonemasons to mend it.

dialogues.cn: 这真是
dialogues.en: This is...

dialogues.cn: 太好心了 阿莉森
dialogues.en: a very kind gesture, Alicent.

dialogues.cn: 太好心了
dialogues.en: Very kind.

dialogues.cn: 进来
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 是御前首相
dialogues.en: The Hand, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 我已经召集了御前会议成员
dialogues.en: Your Grace, I've called the small council

dialogues.cn: 开一个紧急会议
dialogues.en: to an emergency session.

dialogues.cn: 为什么？
dialogues.en: Why?

dialogues.cn: 我想您最好能直接与会
dialogues.en: I think it best you hear it directly.

dialogues.cn: 好吧
dialogues.en: Very well.

dialogues.cn: - 戴蒙？ - 亲王留下了一封信
dialogues.en: - Daemon? - The Prince left a missive

dialogues.cn: 或许可以解释他的动机
dialogues.en: which I believe might explain.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙·坦格利安
dialogues.en: "It is the pleasure of Daemon Targaryen...

dialogues.cn: 龙石岛亲王
dialogues.en: the Prince of Dragonstone

dialogues.cn: 铁王座合法继承人
dialogues.en: and rightful heir to the Iron Throne...

dialogues.cn: 在此宣布 他将依循古瓦雷利亚传统
dialogues.en: to announce that he is to take a second wife

dialogues.cn: 迎娶第二位妻子
dialogues.en: in the tradition of Old Valyria.

dialogues.cn: 她将冠以龙石岛的梅莎丽亚夫人这一尊称
dialogues.en: She is to assume the title Lady Mysaria of Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 殿下已怀有孩子
dialogues.en: Her Grace is with child

dialogues.cn: 根据坦格利安家族习俗
dialogues.en: and is to have a dragon's egg placed in the babe's cradle

dialogues.cn: 新生儿的摇篮中将放置一枚龙蛋
dialogues.en: in the custom of House Targaryen."

dialogues.cn: 陛下 戴蒙王子邀请您参加他的婚礼
dialogues.en: The Prince has invited you to his wedding, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: - 就在两天后 - 诸神保佑
dialogues.en: - It is in two days' time. - Gods be good.

dialogues.cn: 梅莎丽亚夫人是谁？
dialogues.en: Who is Lady Mysaria?

dialogues.cn: - 据我们所知 - 是戴蒙的婊子
dialogues.en: - We believe... - Daemon's whore.

dialogues.cn: - 这无异于煽动叛乱 - 我非常赞同 大人
dialogues.en: - This is nothing less than sedition. - I strongly agree, sire.

dialogues.cn: 我的弟弟想要激怒我
dialogues.en: My brother wishes to provoke me.

dialogues.cn: 回应反倒正中他的下怀
dialogues.en: To answer is to give him what he wants.

dialogues.cn: 举国上下都在看着呢 陛下
dialogues.en: The realm is watching, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你想让我怎样？
dialogues.en: What would you have me do?

dialogues.cn: 把他发配去绝境长城？
dialogues.en: Send him to the Wall?

dialogues.cn: 或许我可以把他的脑袋插在长矛上
dialogues.en: Perhaps I could put his head on a spike.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙已经占领了龙石岛
dialogues.en: Daemon has seized Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 身边围绕着金袍子军队
dialogues.en: Has surrounded himself with an army of Gold Cloaks

dialogues.cn: 现在又盗取了危险的武器
dialogues.en: and has now stolen a dangerous weapon.

dialogues.cn: 组个小队 奥托
dialogues.en: Assemble a detachment, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 我要亲自去龙石岛把戴蒙抓回来
dialogues.en: I will go to Dragonstone and drag Daemon back

dialogues.cn: - 接受审判 - 陛下
dialogues.en: - to face justice myself. - Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 抱歉 陛下 但我不能允许
dialogues.en: My apologies, Your Grace, but I cannot allow it.

dialogues.cn: 那太危险了
dialogues.en: It's too dangerous.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙无法无天
dialogues.en: Daemon is without limit.

dialogues.cn: 让我去龙石岛吧
dialogues.en: Let me go to Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 你是整个王宫里最标致的姑娘
dialogues.en: You're the most comely girl at court.

dialogues.cn: 为什么要伤害自己呢？
dialogues.en: Why do you destroy yourself?

dialogues.cn: 你今晚会去见国王吗？
dialogues.en: Will you see the King tonight?

dialogues.cn: 如果您希望的话
dialogues.en: If you wish it.

dialogues.cn: - 日安 克里斯顿爵士 - 小姐
dialogues.en: - Good day, Ser Criston. - My Lady.

dialogues.cn: 我召集了二十个您最好的家兵 国王之手大人
dialogues.en: I've assembled 20 of your best household guards, my Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 哈罗德爵士会和我们一起去
dialogues.en: Ser Harrold will also join us.

dialogues.cn: 请照顾好国王之手 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: Please look after the Hand, Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 欢迎来到龙石岛 奥托
dialogues.en: Welcome to Dragonstone, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 你在这个岛的占领期到此为止
dialogues.en: Your occupation of this island is at an end.

dialogues.cn: 你要交出龙蛋
dialogues.en: You're to relinquish the dragon's egg

dialogues.cn: 遣散你的军队
dialogues.en: disband your army

dialogues.cn: 驱逐你的婊子……
dialogues.en: banish your whore...

dialogues.cn: 然后遵照韦赛里斯国王陛下的命令
dialogues.en: and leave Dragonstone by order of His Grace

dialogues.cn: - 离开龙石岛 - 国王在哪呢？我没看到他
dialogues.en: - King Viserys. - Where is the King? I don't see him.

dialogues.cn: 陛下绝不会自降身份来参加这样一个戏子的闹剧
dialogues.en: His Grace would never lower himself to entertain such a mummer's farce.

dialogues.cn: 是克里斯宾爵士 对吗
dialogues.en: Ser Crispin, wasn't it?

dialogues.cn: 是克里斯顿·科尔爵士 王子
dialogues.en: Ser Criston Cole, my Prince.

dialogues.cn: 对 抱歉 我记不住
dialogues.en: Yes, apologies. I couldn't recall.

dialogues.cn: 也许王子记得住我把他打下马这事
dialogues.en: Perhaps my Prince recalls when I knocked him off his horse.

dialogues.cn: - 不错 - 这真是场可悲的作秀
dialogues.en: - Very good. - This is a truly pathetic show

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙
dialogues.en: Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 你就这么迫切地渴望得到国王的关注
dialogues.en: Are you so desperate for the King's attention

dialogues.cn: 不惜像一个平凡的扒手那样偷盗？
dialogues.en: that you've resorted to skulking about like a common cutpurse?

dialogues.cn: 我只不过是在遵循家族的传统
dialogues.en: I'm simply keeping with the traditions of my house

dialogues.cn: 就像我哥给他的继承人做的一样
dialogues.en: the same as my brother did for his heir.

dialogues.cn: 这些传统是为王族的嫡生后裔所设
dialogues.en: Those traditions are for the trueborn children of royalty.

dialogues.cn: 而不是一个普通婊子的私生子
dialogues.en: Not for bastards fathered on a common whore.

dialogues.cn: 梅莎丽亚小姐将会成为我的妻子
dialogues.en: Lady Mysaria is to be my wife.

dialogues.cn: 这真是造孽
dialogues.en: This is an abomination.

dialogues.cn: 你的每次呼吸都是在玷污你的名字
dialogues.en: With every breath, you soil your name

dialogues.cn: 你的家族和你哥哥的统治
dialogues.en: your house and your brother's reign.

dialogues.cn: 爱又不分头衔和传统
dialogues.en: Our love does not know titles and traditions.

dialogues.cn: 那么你们呢 都城守备队的士兵们？
dialogues.en: And what of you, men of the City Watch?

dialogues.cn: 帮助王子叛国吗？
dialogues.en: Aiding the Prince in his treason?

dialogues.cn: 国王任命我为他们的指挥官
dialogues.en: The King made me their commander.

dialogues.cn: 他们忠诚于我
dialogues.en: They are loyal to me.

dialogues.cn: 你是为了这龙蛋来的
dialogues.en: You've come for the egg.

dialogues.cn: 它就在这
dialogues.en: Here it is.

dialogues.cn: 你疯了吗
dialogues.en: Are you mad?

dialogues.cn: - 你会死的 - 我很乐意 反正你也活不下来
dialogues.en: - You'd never survive this. - Well, happily, neither would you.

dialogues.cn: 在此地诉诸暴力就是在向你的国王宣战
dialogues.en: To choose violence here is to declare war against your King.

dialogues.cn: 太好了
dialogues.en: Wonderful.

dialogues.cn: 就算这会使你未出生的孩子随母亲一道死去？
dialogues.en: Even if it ends in the death of your unborn child and its mother?

dialogues.cn: 所有人
dialogues.en: All of you.

dialogues.cn: 把该死的兵器收回去
dialogues.en: Sheathe the fucking steel.

dialogues.cn: - 你在这里干什么 公主？ - 阻止流血
dialogues.en: - What are you doing here, Princess? - Preventing bloodshed.

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿爵士 请护卫公主到安全的地方
dialogues.en: Ser Criston, please escort the Princess to safety.

dialogues.cn: 小心不要惊动叙拉克斯 大人们
dialogues.en: Take care not to startle Syrax, my lords.

dialogues.cn: 她很护我的
dialogues.en: She's rather protective of me.

dialogues.cn: 我就在这里 叔叔
dialogues.en: I'm right here, Uncle.

dialogues.cn: 你愤怒的对象
dialogues.en: The object of your ire.

dialogues.cn: 你被剥夺继承权的原因
dialogues.en: The reason that you were disinherited.

dialogues.cn: 如果你想恢复继承人的身份 你需要杀了我
dialogues.en: If you wish to be restored as heir, you'll need to kill me.

dialogues.cn: 动手吧
dialogues.en: So do it.

dialogues.cn: 把这些麻烦都解决了
dialogues.en: And be done with all this bother.

dialogues.cn: 你宣布我们要结婚？
dialogues.en: You announced that we were to be wed?

dialogues.cn: 明天就结
dialogues.en: On the morrow.

dialogues.cn: 还说我怀了孩子
dialogues.en: And that I was with child.

dialogues.cn: 你的孩子
dialogues.en: Your child.

dialogues.cn: 也许等我们结婚了 这事就能成真了
dialogues.en: Well, perhaps when we are wed, we can make that true.

dialogues.cn: 我很早以前就确保了 我绝不会为生产所迫
dialogues.en: I ensured long ago that I would never be threatened by childbirth.

dialogues.cn: 太好了 孩子有时候是那么烦人
dialogues.en: Good. Children can be such irritating creatures.

dialogues.cn: 你发誓要保护我的 戴蒙
dialogues.en: You swore to protect me, Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 龙石岛非常安全
dialogues.en: Dragonstone is quite secure.

dialogues.cn: 直到国王决定收回他祖传的族堡
dialogues.en: Until the King decides to reclaim his ancestral seat.

dialogues.cn: 他的士兵也许不会把王子的脑袋插在长矛上
dialogues.en: His men might not put the Prince's head on a spike

dialogues.cn: 但他们对王子宣称要与之结婚生子的
dialogues.en: but what would they do with the common whore

dialogues.cn: 一个普通的婊子又会怎样呢？
dialogues.en: he claims he's taken to wife and made with child?

dialogues.cn: 没有人会伤害你的
dialogues.en: No one will harm you.

dialogues.cn: 我已经无数次被作为财产贩卖了 都懒得数了
dialogues.en: I have been sold as property more times than I care to count

dialogues.cn: 最开始是在一个我都不记得的家乡
dialogues.en: beginning in a homeland I can no longer recall.

dialogues.cn: 我的大部分人生都是在恐惧中度过的
dialogues.en: Most of my years have been spent living in terror.

dialogues.cn: 你和我在一起很安全 我保证
dialogues.en: You're safe with me, I swear it.

dialogues.cn: 你是坦格利安家族的人
dialogues.en: You are Targaryen.

dialogues.cn: 你大可以和国王玩你愚蠢的游戏
dialogues.en: You can afford to play your stupid games with the King

dialogues.cn: 但我不行
dialogues.en: but I cannot.

dialogues.cn: 我来服侍你不是为了金子或权力
dialogues.en: I didn't come into your service wanting gold or power

dialogues.cn: 或是地位
dialogues.en: or station.

dialogues.cn: - 我来到你身边是想要解放 - 解放？
dialogues.en: - I came to you to be liberated. - Liberated?

dialogues.cn: 从谁手里解放？
dialogues.en: From what?

dialogues.cn: 恐惧
dialogues.en: Fear.

dialogues.cn: 不必多礼 请坐 莱昂诺伯爵
dialogues.en: No, please, Lord Lyonel.

dialogues.cn: 我希望得到无所顾忌的意见
dialogues.en: I have come looking for an unencumbered opinion.

dialogues.cn: 我一直致力于此 陛下
dialogues.en: That's all I would ever give, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 自从我的名字
dialogues.en: Ever since my name was read

dialogues.cn: 被大议会的博士念出
dialogues.en: by the archmaesters at the Great Council

dialogues.cn: 科利斯·瓦列利安嫉妒的眼神就一直盯着我
dialogues.en: I have felt Corlys Velaryon's envious gaze staring at me

dialogues.cn: 都越过了黑水湾
dialogues.en: from across the Blackwater.

dialogues.cn: 您坐在王国的最高位置上 陛下
dialogues.en: You sit upon the highest seat in the realm, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 骄傲的人们不喜欢仰头看人
dialogues.en: Proud men don't like having to look up.

dialogues.cn: 兰娜尔·瓦列利安
dialogues.en: Laena Velaryon.

dialogues.cn: 科利斯爵士是您的海政大臣
dialogues.en: Lord Corlys is your Master of Ships

dialogues.cn: 而她是王国里最富裕家族的长女
dialogues.en: and she is the eldest daughter of the wealthiest house in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 她毫无疑问来自瓦雷利亚世族
dialogues.en: She comes from unimpeachable Valyrian stock

dialogues.cn: 并且还有坦格利安血统
dialogues.en: and she has Targaryen blood.

dialogues.cn: - 有何不可呢？ - 她十二岁
dialogues.en: - What's to mislike? - She is twelve.

dialogues.cn: 她会长大的
dialogues.en: She will mature.

dialogues.cn: 我从未要求再婚
dialogues.en: I never asked to remarry.

dialogues.cn: 作为国王 您拥有一切
dialogues.en: As King, you have a claim on all things.

dialogues.cn: 甚至是那些您不想要的
dialogues.en: Even those you don't want.

dialogues.cn: 婚姻这项义务您无法逃避太久
dialogues.en: Marriage is not an obligation you can put off for long.

dialogues.cn: 如果我拒绝科利斯爵士的提议呢？
dialogues.en: What if I was to reject Lord Corlys's proposal?

dialogues.cn: 他很可能不会坦然接受
dialogues.en: He would not be like to take it well.

dialogues.cn: 我担心除了一条通往铁王座的直线之外 没有什么能让他满意
dialogues.en: I fear nothing short of a direct line to the Iron Throne would satisfy him.

dialogues.cn: 你还需要考虑一下
dialogues.en: You should also consider

dialogues.cn: 我们现在在石阶列岛的情况
dialogues.en: that we find ourselves on the precipice of war

dialogues.cn: 正处于开战的边缘
dialogues.en: in the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 而海蛇掌握了全国将近一半的舰队
dialogues.en: And the Sea Snake holds claim to nearly half the realm's ships.

dialogues.cn: 如果国家有需要 他怎敢拒绝
dialogues.en: He would not dare withhold them in the face of the realm's need.

dialogues.cn: - 谁敢威胁我？ - 没人敢 陛下
dialogues.en: - Who is he to hector me? - No one, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 但潮头岛那边做盟友要好过做敌人
dialogues.en: But Driftmark makes for a better ally than it does an enemy.

dialogues.cn: 海蛇已经算计好了
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake has made a calculated reach.

dialogues.cn: 对他这个地位的人来讲 这才算公平
dialogues.en: A fair play for a man of his position.

dialogues.cn: 如果您真心想听我的诚挚意见……
dialogues.en: If you truly want my unencumbered opinion...

dialogues.cn: 说吧
dialogues.en: I do.

dialogues.cn: 您应该迎娶兰娜尔·瓦列利安 陛下
dialogues.en: You should wed Laena Velaryon, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 满足科利斯大人的要求 让他稳稳站在你这边
dialogues.en: Sate Lord Corlys and fix him at your side

dialogues.cn: 永远结为盟友
dialogues.en: permanently, as an ally.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 公主从龙石岛回来了
dialogues.en: The Princess has returned from Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 龙石岛？
dialogues.en: Dragonstone?

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你违背我的命令
dialogues.en: You disobeyed me.

dialogues.cn: 你一字不提就离开君临
dialogues.en: You fled King's Landing without a word

dialogues.cn: 而且没有国王的许可就擅自行动
dialogues.en: and you acted without the crown's leave.

dialogues.cn: 你是我唯一的继承人
dialogues.en: You are my only heir.

dialogues.cn: 你有可能遇害
dialogues.en: You could've been killed.

dialogues.cn: 我能坐下吗？
dialogues.en: May I sit?

dialogues.cn: 你去了龙石岛
dialogues.en: You went to Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 还取回了龙蛋 没流一滴血
dialogues.en: And retrieved the egg without bloodshed.

dialogues.cn: 我不确定奥托爵士能完成如此壮举
dialogues.en: A feat I'm not sure Ser Otto could've accomplished alone.

dialogues.cn: 是的 的确……
dialogues.en: Yes, well...

dialogues.cn: 有时候我都忘记了你们究竟有多像
dialogues.en: I sometimes forget how alike you both were.

dialogues.cn: 你母亲的离去 是我永远无法愈合的伤口
dialogues.en: Your mother's absence is a wound that will never heal.

dialogues.cn: 没有她
dialogues.en: Without her

dialogues.cn: 红堡失去了温暖
dialogues.en: the Red Keep has lost a warmth

dialogues.cn: 我敢说它永远都无法恢复如初了
dialogues.en: that I dare say it will never recover.

dialogues.cn: 我很高兴听到你这么说
dialogues.en: It pleases me to hear you say this.

dialogues.cn: 知道我并不是一个人在悲伤
dialogues.en: To know that I'm not alone in my grief.

dialogues.cn: 我真希望她走以后
dialogues.en: I wish I had known better...

dialogues.cn: 我能知道该对你说些什么
dialogues.en: what to say to you in the aftermath.

dialogues.cn: 我好不容易才意识到
dialogues.en: I struggled to realize

dialogues.cn: 我的女儿这么快就长成了一个女人
dialogues.en: that my daughter had so quickly become a woman grown.

dialogues.cn: 但我知道
dialogues.en: But I know

dialogues.cn: 她懂我现在应该做什么
dialogues.en: she understands what is now expected of me.

dialogues.cn: 国王必须要迎娶新妻子
dialogues.en: The King must take a new wife.

dialogues.cn: 我永远无法替换你的母亲
dialogues.en: I could never replace your mother.

dialogues.cn: 就像我不会让别人替换你成为继承人
dialogues.en: No more than I intend to replace you as heir.

dialogues.cn: 但你是我唯一的继承人
dialogues.en: But you are my only heir

dialogues.cn: 而我们的血脉太脆弱 太容易被终结了
dialogues.en: and our line is vulnerable, too easily ended.

dialogues.cn: 通过再婚
dialogues.en: And by marrying again

dialogues.cn: 我可以着手确保更好的防御
dialogues.en: I may begin to ensure that we are better defended.

dialogues.cn: 对付谁？
dialogues.en: Against whom?

dialogues.cn: 那些胆敢挑战我们的人
dialogues.en: Whomever may dare to challenge us.

dialogues.cn: 我不希望我们之间变得疏远
dialogues.en: I do not wish to make us estranged.

dialogues.cn: 您是国王
dialogues.en: You are the King

dialogues.cn: 所以您的首要责任是国家
dialogues.en: and so your first duty is to the realm.

dialogues.cn: 母亲会理解的
dialogues.en: Mother would've understood this.

dialogues.cn: 我也是
dialogues.en: Just as I do.

dialogues.cn: 早安 大人们
dialogues.en: Good morrow, my lords.

dialogues.cn: 我已经决定将迎娶新妻子
dialogues.en: I have decided to take a new wife.

dialogues.cn: 我打算娶……
dialogues.en: I intend to marry...

dialogues.cn: 阿莉森·海塔尔小姐
dialogues.en: the Lady Alicent Hightower

dialogues.cn: 在春天结束前举行婚礼
dialogues.en: before spring's end.

dialogues.cn: 太荒谬了
dialogues.en: This is an absurdity.

dialogues.cn: 我的家族有瓦雷利亚血脉 有举国最强的力量
dialogues.en: My house is Valyrian, the greatest power in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 而我是你的君王
dialogues.en: And I am your King.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族的起源可以追溯到古瓦雷利亚
dialogues.en: House Velaryon's origins reach back to Old Valyria.

dialogues.cn: 甚至比坦格利安家族还古老
dialogues.en: More ancient even than House Targaryen

dialogues.cn: 有些记录这么说
dialogues.en: according to some texts.

dialogues.cn: 但和坦格利安不同的是
dialogues.en: But unlike the Targaryens

dialogues.cn: 我们不是龙王
dialogues.en: we were no dragonlords.

dialogues.cn: 几百年来 我们家族不得不
dialogues.en: For centuries, my house had to scratch out

dialogues.cn: 依靠勇气和运气
dialogues.en: an existence from the sea

dialogues.cn: 在大海中谋生
dialogues.en: with grit and luck.

dialogues.cn: 当我坐上浮木王座
dialogues.en: When I ascended the Driftwood Throne...

dialogues.cn: 我知道我要的是什么
dialogues.en: I knew what I wanted.

dialogues.cn: 所以我走出去攫取
dialogues.en: So I went out and seized it.

dialogues.cn: 和这个国家其他领主不同
dialogues.en: Unlike every other lord of the realm

dialogues.cn: 我可以说是我自己筑起了家族高位
dialogues.en: I can say that I built my house's high seat

dialogues.cn: 凭我自己的实力
dialogues.en: with the strength of mine own back.

dialogues.cn: 我一直觉得你和我
dialogues.en: I've always thought of you and I

dialogues.cn: 就像一块料子裁出来的
dialogues.en: as having been made from the same cloth.

dialogues.cn: 我倒没发现你有个国王老哥
dialogues.en: I wasn't aware you had a king for a brother.

dialogues.cn: 我们都是在这个世界上自谋出路的人
dialogues.en: We're both men who have had to cut our own way through the world.

dialogues.cn: 我们太常被人忽略了
dialogues.en: We've been passed over too often.

dialogues.cn: 你叫我来潮头岛
dialogues.en: Did you call me to Driftmark

dialogues.cn: 就为了提醒我的卑微地位吗 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: to remind me of my low standing, Lord Corlys

dialogues.cn: 或者还有其他什么原因？
dialogues.en: or was there some other reason?

dialogues.cn: 你听说石阶列岛的动乱了吗？
dialogues.en: You've heard of the troubles in the Stepstones?

dialogues.cn: 某个密尔亲王用维斯特洛的水手喂螃蟹
dialogues.en: Some Myrish prince is feeding Westerosi sailors to the crabs.

dialogues.cn: 我一直在请求国王派我的海军前去那里
dialogues.en: I have been petitioning the King to send my navy into the territory

dialogues.cn: 但都被他拒绝了
dialogues.en: but he's denied me.

dialogues.cn: 这从来不是我哥哥最擅长的地方
dialogues.en: It was never my brother's strongest trait.

dialogues.cn: 什么？
dialogues.en: What?

dialogues.cn: 当国王
dialogues.en: Being king.

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹喂食者有
dialogues.en: The Crabfeeder is backed by

dialogues.cn: 自由贸易城邦内诸多强权的支持
dialogues.en: powerful entities within the Free Cities

dialogues.cn: 他们希望削弱维斯特洛
dialogues.en: who wish to see Westeros weakened.

dialogues.cn: 而国王的无所作为
dialogues.en: And the King's failures

dialogues.cn: 让他积累了实力
dialogues.en: have allowed him to accumulate strength.

dialogues.cn: 如果这些航线沦陷……
dialogues.en: If those shipping lanes fall...

dialogues.cn: 会让我的家族跛足难行
dialogues.en: my house will be crippled.

dialogues.cn: 我不会让潮头岛变成乞丐
dialogues.en: And I will not have Driftmark beggared

dialogues.cn: 另一边 我们的国王却在宴会 舞会和比武大会上虚度光阴
dialogues.en: while our King idles himself with feasts and balls and tourneys.

dialogues.cn: 我可以肆意评论我哥哥
dialogues.en: I will speak of my brother as I wish.

dialogues.cn: 但你不行
dialogues.en: You will not.

dialogues.cn: 在石阶列岛等待你的
dialogues.en: Waiting in the Stepstones

dialogues.cn: 是一个机会 向那些怀疑你的人
dialogues.en: is a chance for you to prove your worth

dialogues.cn: 证明你的价值
dialogues.en: to any who might yet doubt it.

dialogues.cn: 我们都是王国的次子 戴蒙
dialogues.en: We are the realm's second sons, Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 我们的价值并非别人赠予
dialogues.en: Our worth is not given.

dialogues.cn: 而要自己创造
dialogues.en: It must be made.

dialogues.en: “小梅夫人” 戴蒙的情妇

dialogues.cn: 科拉克休
dialogues.en: 戴蒙的龙

dialogues.cn: 叙拉克斯
dialogues.en: 雷妮拉的龙

dialogues.cn: 莱昂诺·斯壮
dialogues.en: 法务大臣

dialogues.cn: 这件事发生在深夜时分 诸位大人
dialogues.en: Atroksio sȳndrorro massitas, āeksīs ñuhis.

dialogues.cn: 在蝠时 窃贼躲过了我们的追捕
dialogues.en: Masso Jēdunna. Laodikio īlot upȳdas.

dialogues.cn: 龙蛋怎么会在五十多名龙卫眼皮下被偷走的？
dialogues.en: Skorkydoso zaldrīzo drōmon tōmēpsa urneroti rȳ laodikson kōttas?

dialogues.cn: 犯人是戴蒙王子 陛下
dialogues.en: Dārilaros Daemon sikio sīdas, Eglivys Aōhys…

dialogues.cn: 哪颗龙蛋 长老？
dialogues.en: Skorior drōmon, Uēpys?

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙拿走了哪颗龙蛋？
dialogues.en: Skorior drōmon Daemon lāettas?

dialogues.cn: 梦火的蛋 公主
dialogues.en: Drōmon Ēdrurzo īles, Dārilaros.

dialogues.cn: 您为贝尔隆王子的摇篮选的那颗
dialogues.en: Dārilaro Baelo mazumbille iderēptā hēnkon luon.

dialogues.cn: 我父亲立我为龙石岛公主
dialogues.en: Kepa ñuha yne Zaldrīzdōro Dārilaroso brōstas.

dialogues.cn: 你住到我的城堡里了 叔叔
dialogues.en: Kesy uglaesā luon sombāzmion ñuhon issa, kepus.

dialogues.cn: 等你成年了才是你的
dialogues.en: Iā sīlāvose iōrō, daor.

dialogues.cn: 你惹怒了你的国王
dialogues.en: Vēdroso dāri aōhi iqīdā.

dialogues.cn: 我看不出缘由
dialogues.en: Indirarion urnion daor.

dialogues.cn: 这是个值得庆贺的日子 我要结婚了
dialogues.en: Tubī manaeri. Nyke dīnilaks.

dialogues.cn: 你已经有妻子了
dialogues.en: Ābrazȳri sīr emā.

dialogues.cn: 不是我选的人
dialogues.en: Derēptan lī, daor.

dialogues.cn: 所以你就要偷走我弟弟的龙蛋？
dialogues.en: Se kejo syt ñuho valonqro drōmon laodigon aō bēviltas?

dialogues.cn: 你出生的时候和一条龙共享了摇篮
dialogues.en: Bībot zaldrīzome mazumbillo vulē.

dialogues.cn: 我想要我的孩子得到同样待遇
dialogues.en: Konir ñuho rūho syt jaelan.

dialogues.cn: 你要有孩子了？
dialogues.en: Sikilāt?

dialogues.cn: 总有一天会有的
dialogues.en: Māzīlarē tubī.
